mapper.select: select tool_name, expose_mcp, show_in_ui, updated_at from lego_local_builtin_tool_exposure
mapper.insert: insert into lego_local_builtin_tool_exposure (tool_name, expose_mcp, show_in_ui, updated_at) values (#{toolName}, true, true, now()) on conflict (tool_name) do nothing
mapper.update: update lego_local_builtin_tool_exposure set expose_mcp = #{exposeMcp}, show_in_ui = #{showInUi}, updated_at = now() where tool_name = #{toolName}
